response.overview: # Second Chance (SYTD2)  The story follows a married couple, Pras (Fedi) and Arini (Bella), who resume their life together with their daughter, Nadia (Sandrina), after Pras's second wife, Meirose (Raline), leaves them. Arini receives an invitation to Budapest, Hungary to promote her book. Unexpectedly, fate brings the entire family together with Meirose and her son Akhbar (Keefe). Meirose's departure with Akhbar was to start a new life and forget the painful past that nearly destroyed Arini's marriage. Although Meirose still adores and loves Pras, she is determined to go through with the divorce. However, her reunion with Arini makes her conflicted because the noble woman hopes that Meirose will return to Pras's arms. Moreover, the presence of Doctor Syarief (Reza) in Meirose's life also raises questions. What will be the outcome of their story? A million questions and surprises will unfold in SYTD2. OFFICIAL TRAILER
response.title: Sinopsis Surga Yang Tak Dirindukan 2

cast.name: Laudya Cynthia Bella dan Raline Shah
